query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS career_tracks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeId INT NOT NULL,
  trackType ENUM('architect_manager', 'coordinator_to_manager', 'permanent_staff') NOT NULL,
  currentPhase ENUM('onboarding', 'year_1', 'year_2', 'transition_eligible', 'in_transition', 'transitioned', 'opted_out') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'onboarding',
  startDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  year1CompletionDate TIMESTAMP,
  year2CompletionDate TIMESTAMP,
  transitionEligibleDate TIMESTAMP,
  transitionStartDate TIMESTAMP,
  transitionCompletedDate TIMESTAMP,
  optedOutDate TIMESTAMP,
  optOutReason TEXT,
  isFoundingMember BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  mentorEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  boardEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS career_tracks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeId INT NOT NULL,
  trackType ENUM('architect_manager', 'coordinator_to_manager', 'permanent_staff') NOT NULL,
  currentPhase ENUM('onboarding', 'year_1', 'year_2', 'transition_eligible', 'in_transition', 'transitioned', 'opted_out') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'onboarding',
  startDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  year1CompletionDate TIMESTAMP,
  year2CompletionDate TIMESTAMP,
  transitionEligibleDate TIMESTAMP,
  transitionStartDate TIMESTAMP,
  transitionCompletedDate TIMESTAMP,
  optedOutDate TIMESTAMP,
  optOutReason TEXT,
  isFoundingMember BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  mentorEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  boardEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
